programme.title: Give Me Shelter - Film
programme.desc: Celebrities are on a mission to save animals caught in the crosshairs of human arrogance and greed.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep112: Deep White - Why Sharks Attack
programme.desc: Deep White explores ways to research sharks to determine why sharks attack and to study innovative ways to train sharks in order to prevent future attacks. Sharks are surprisingly intelligent and able to perform complex tasks. Sharks can distinguish different signals and cues in feeding routines and they develop strong bonds with their trainers.

programme.title: Let's Take It Outside Ep107: Fish On…Cayman Islands International Fishing Tournament Wild Cayman Adventures (Part 1)
programme.desc: Hop-aboard as we’re fishing the Cayman Islands International Fishing Tournament hoping to win big. In this episode you’ll also enjoy Cayman Yoga and Wellness Adventures plus plenty of fresh, fine dining.

programme.title: Next Stop Ep304: Orlando, Florida - USA
programme.desc: Next Stop explores Orlando, Florida, by hanggliding at Wallaby Ranch, wrestling alligators at Gatorland, taking a Boggy Creek airboat ride, checking out The Ravenous Pig Gastropub, savoring the organic beer at Orlando Brewing, kicking back at the Lake Buena Vista Resort, and enjoying the music of Sailor 1942.

programme.title: Xplash Ep103
programme.desc: Xplash brings you eye-popping water-related action from around the globe. Today we’ll soar with the North Kiteboarding Team, slackline across the treacherous gorge at Victoria Falls, and we begin this episode with gonzo wakeboarding in Sweden.

programme.title: Surfing Lifestyle Ep105: California’s Ideal Surf Spots
programme.desc: When you get a collective of six of the world's hottest junior surfers together for a road trip down the coastal highway of California, expectations are tetering on nuclear for some high octane performance surfing.

programme.title: Blue World Ep809: Honduran Sea Turtles + Shangri-La Cave
programme.desc: Blue World heads to Roatan, in Honduras, to meet the local population of sea turtles, where he witnesses an altercation over delicious sponges and ways in which fish steal food from turtles. Then we explore an incredibly tight and dangerous cave in Florida.

programme.title: Water Ways TV Ep208: 750-Nautical Mile Run in a “Starter Boat”…Montreal to Manhattan
programme.desc: Water Ways TV's host, Steven Bull, completes the 750-nautical mile run in the “starter boat” going from Montreal to Manhattan.

programme.title: The Blue Realm Ep112: Deep White - Why Sharks Attack
programme.desc: Deep White explores ways to research sharks to determine why sharks attack and to study innovative ways to train sharks in order to prevent future attacks. Sharks are surprisingly intelligent and able to perform complex tasks. Sharks can distinguish different signals and cues in feeding routines and they develop strong bonds with their trainers.

programme.title: Let's Take It Outside Ep107: Fish On…Cayman Islands International Fishing Tournament Wild Cayman Adventures (Part 1)
programme.desc: Hop-aboard as we’re fishing the Cayman Islands International Fishing Tournament hoping to win big. In this episode you’ll also enjoy Cayman Yoga and Wellness Adventures plus plenty of fresh, fine dining.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Down For This
programme.desc: Down For This is a rollercoaster of adrenaline and heartfelt emotion in a 1-hour-25-minute slide of 30 years past to present. Featuring some of the most memorable Volcom skating surfing and snowboarding.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 1
programme.desc: In Chapter One of Side Hits Euphoria, snowboarders Oli Gittler and Arthur Longo showcase their favorite features to ride; random jumps and hits on the side of the piste. They spent their season capturing these little treasures hiding in plain sight.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 2
programme.desc: Chapter 2 of Side Hits Euphoria features resort riding, side hits, and random stuff on the slopes. In December 2018, the snowboarders Oli Gittler and Arthur Longo filmed everything they found during their travels to Mount Seymour in Canada, and in Laax and Arêches-Beaufort in Switzerland.

programme.title: SHE (Side Hits Euphoria) Chapter 3
programme.desc: Side Hits Euphoria is back! Chapter 3 features resort riding, side bonking, groomer gliding, and pure shredding. Filmed by the snowboarders Olivier Gittler and Arthur Longo in December of 2019, in and around Tignes, Val d’Isère, Avoriaz and Chamonix, France. Thanks for watching!

programme.title: Creedlecosm
programme.desc: Volcom presents CreedleCosm, a snowboarding cinematic masterpiece. Starring Mike Rav, Scott Blum, Desiree Melancon, Egan Wint, Seb Picaro, Arthur Longo, Torgeir Bergrem, Pat Moore, Bryan Iguchi, Jadyn Chomlack, Juliette Pelchat, Estelle Pensiero, Jamie Lynn, Alec Majerus and Simon Bannerot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Crosspollution
programme.desc: High voltage shred flick from the Volcom Skateboarding and Snowboarding teams. Starring Benny Milam, Cody Warble, Reid Smith, Lenny Mazzotti, Jack Harold, Scott Blum, Christian Connors, CJ Collins, Axel Cruysberghs, Alec Majerus, Henry Gartland and Mike Ravelson. Edited by Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Inexact Odyssey
programme.desc: ‘Inexact Odyssey’ is a film about unexpected adventure and endless opportunity. From the winding canyons of Zion National Park to the high alpine passes of Arlberg, Austria, filmmaker Seth Huot uses his Super-8 camera to capture spontaneous travels and impromptu sessions with the Volcom Snow team.

programme.title: Pusher Bearings Presents: Tchin Tchin
programme.desc: In ‘Tchin Tchin’, the Pusher Bearings crew head to the South of France to do flip tricks and jump off cliffs. Featuring the skateboarding of Kilian Zehnder, Titi Gormit, Robin Fournier, Anto Lopez, Davide Holznecht, and Simon Perottet.

programme.title: Pusher Bearings Presents: Outta Bounds
programme.desc: Thrasher Magazine and Pusher Bearings present ‘Outta Bounds,’ featuring ledges, hip-hop and skate plazas. Pusher’s international team of technicians knows the recipe. Kilian Zehnder, Nick Dias, Carlos Iqui and more bring the flow from South America to Spain.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Alive In Engadin
programme.desc: Do you like beautiful Swiss valleys? Do you like skateboarding? Yes, and yes. Watch photographer Filip Zuan and cinematographer Christian Taro spend a weekend capturing extraordinary spots with the skateboarders Christoph Rediger and Alessandro Magnani. A feast for the eyes and the senses.

programme.title: Doodah Presents: Suscht Guet
programme.desc: SUSCHT GUET is a Swiss skateboard film by Shqipron Bobaj and Tomas Schneider. Featuring Aaron Ulrich, Célian Cordt-Moller, David Nideröst, Dino Brandão, Fabio Prosdocimi, Fin Broder, Flavio Zimmermann, Jànos Herzog, Jeron Breschan, Lorenzo Zuber, Oliver Weismantel, Lukas Bigun, Mike Sidi and more.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Worldly Goods
programme.desc: To celebrate the release of his collection, Louie Lopez spent a week stacking clips between breezy San Francisco and blazing hot Sacramento with a crew of his longtime Volcom teammates; Alec Majerus, Collin Provost, Amos Wilton and Simon Bannerot. Filmed by Ryan Lee, Taylor Phillips and Seth Huot.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: BigWest SouthDown
programme.desc: The Volcom European skate team hits the road in the USA. One big ass van. Some young guns. Some older talent. A trunk full of bags. One generator. Boards. Off we go. Featuring Axel Cruysbergs, Eniz Fazliov, Daan van der Linden, Harry Lintell, Alain Goikoetxea and a few guests. Edit by Yves Marchon.

programme.title: Volcom Presents: Que Saguaro
programme.desc: In ‘Que Saguaro’, Volcom charges through the spillways and street spots of the Southwestern U.S. with Milton Martinez, Collin Provost, Omar Hassan, Mathias Torres, Alec Majerus, Simon Bannerot, CJ Collins, Peter Hewitt, Remy Stratton, Tom Remmilard, Jarrod Pimental, Jaime Lynn and Scott Blum.

programme.title: La Quinta Films Presents: Lines
programme.desc: Lines is a documentary about big mountain snowboarding. The dedication. The nerve. The skill. As we follow the Absinthe Films crew for six weeks in Haines, Alaska, we also explore the colorful characters, history and dangers of big mountain riding. Directed by Axel Pauporté and Flora Richard.

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: More
programme.desc: Absinthe raises the bar again. 'More' ushers in a new era of urban riding, deep powder, massive jumps, and the groundbreaking ‘Human Drone’ to bring you closer to snowboarding than ever before.

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Episode 1
programme.desc: The GC32 Racing Tour is back! The World Sailing foiling catamaran circuit has returned as the world recovers from COVID, and both teams and organizers have been keen to return to racing onboard their state-of-the-art flying catamarans. After 18 months of no racing and cancelled events, the anticipation going into the first event in Lagos, Portugal is huge!After a highly competitive, spectacular 2019 season the GC32 foiling cats are back on the racecourse. In 2021, the ultra-high performance one-design catamarans will visit 3 top venues for 4 events, each location selected specially to provide conditions ideal for the nimble GC32s to fly across the water at 30+ knot speeds.So, let’s travel to Lagos, in southern Portugal's Algarve region to witness the first GC32 Racing Tour event for 2021, Lagos Cup 1.

programme.title: Nastro Rosa Tour - Review
programme.desc: A sports format, innovative and spectacular. An international tour along the mediterranean coasts and lighthouses of the Mediterranean sea.A series of multi-disciplinary sailing events, in an exclusive Italian concept consisting of stages that will touch some of the most beautiful Italian and Mediterranean coastal resorts.

programme.title: The Kayak Man
programme.desc: Another expedition? You must be crazy.This is what Beppe's friend told him when he decided to leave for North America. Even after paddling in the biggest rivers in the world, his desire for adventure was still not satisfied, and he went out looking for more. Dreaming of freedom, sleeping bags and nature, he ventured into the unknown to discover the Yukon and Teslin Rivers.For those unaware, the Yukon river is the major watercourse of the northwest of North America. It flows through the Canadian Yukon Territory and makes it's way to Alaska. The Teslin River is a bit shorter, but not for this reason less fun to dive into. They both offer an impressive scenery amidst cold temperatures, dangerous whitewaters and the wild nature of North America.The Kayak Man takes us on a journey of self discovery through the most beautiful landscapes of Canada and the United States while following the path of a brave kayaker that leaves his life behind in an attempt to explore new horizons by himself. An impressive trip that will not leave him the same way he was before.

programme.title: La Transat AG2R La Mondiale - Episode 1 - Depart
programme.desc: Every two years, the city of Concarneau in southern Finistère hosts the start of the Transat AG2R La Mondiale: the double-handed transatlantic on identical boats, founded over 25 years ago. This time, 15 boats line up on the quay of Carnot to make legend in this incredible competition. Let's dive into the action in France!

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: American Terror Story
programme.desc: This is supernatural horror in the vein of "The Grudge" and "The Ring". The ghost of a young asian girl who committed suicide a century ago is awakened by a group of college students, who fall victim to their own suicides under her spell.

programme.title: Armenian Haunting
programme.desc: An Armenian-American journalist turns into an unwilling ghost hunter while researching the sudden deaths in her family and their connection to a paranormal mystery.

programme.title: Reel Nightmare: Book of Nightmare
programme.desc: Three beautiful, vengeful witches awakened by an ancient book, the Necronomicon, bring production of a film in their old family home to a deadly halt.

programme.title: Sadomaster
programme.desc: Extreme urban violence reigns in Argentina. Senator Beccar Varela rises as the only way to stop violence with his "zero tolerance" politic. People doesn't suspect that Beccar is the head of the nazi gang that causes the violence. When members of the gang torture and rape a retarded man, a mysterious Masked avenger begins his brutal revenge against the gangs and the corrupt politics.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E06 - Cutest
programme.desc: The charming kangaroo. The cuddly koala. The beautiful butterfly. The cheerful clownfish. Or the adorable budgie - which one is the cutest of them all?

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E07 - Wild Australia
programme.desc: More than 80 percent of Australia’s plants, mammals, reptiles and frogs are unique to Australia and are found nowhere else in the world. Wild dingos, frisky kangaroos, deceptively cuddly looking koalas and playful platypuses are some of the most iconic of Australia’s wild animals.

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E08 - Masters of the Sky
programme.desc: So many words describe the many ways that birds fly – pelicans and kestrels soar but owls fly silently. Parrots flock, vultures swarm and eagles swoop. Radar-accurate eyes scan the ground and slotted feathers adjust flight paths as hawks attack. But, which is the true master of the sky?

programme.title: Wild Ones - S01:E09 - Disguised
programme.desc: Now you see me… now you don’t. A look at the masters of disguise. From hidden lizards and invisible spiders to camouflaged cats and shimmering squids.

programme.title: Same Lies New Loops
programme.desc: The enemy loves to trap you in the same old lies: “It’s not enough” and “You’re not loved.” But God’s truth breaks the cycle. When you change what you say, you change what you see, and His presence opens a new loop of peace and hope.

programme.title: Where You Meet With God
programme.desc: Don’t go for a goal without God this year. When you invite His presence in, He’ll be with you every step of the way, bringing things to the surface, and showing you what to reach for.

programme.title: When God Gives A Thought To You
programme.desc: We live in a world that values things more than thoughts, so when God speaks to us, we don’t always value it like we should. In this message, learn some of the ways God speaks, when to ask for it, and how to recognize it when He does.

programme.title: The War Of Whispers
programme.desc: Ever feel like there are too many voices telling you what to do and who to be? The enemy whispers fear, doubt, and distraction, but God’s whisper brings peace, purpose, and direction. When you stop agreeing with the enemy’s lies and start trusting the whisper of the One who sent you, you’ll find confidence in where — and who — you are.

programme.title: Where You Meet With God
programme.desc: Don’t go for a goal without God this year. When you invite His presence in, He’ll be with you every step of the way, bringing things to the surface, and showing you what to reach for.

programme.title: When You Just Can't Win
programme.desc: If you’re feeling stuck in a cycle of defeat, remember that God’s promises are guaranteed but not automatic. Keep consistently showing up and praising Him for the victories He’s given you, because more are on the way.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila offers Patricia to hand over the video, only if she betrays Fausto and gives it to the police. Patricia tells Camila that her mother was not such a saint and that she was the cause of this war between the families, because of her relationship with two men at the same time. Fausto hires Anton again to kill his wife.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Fausto and Ezequiel confront each other; the video that projects Celso's death will sink Fausto unless he signs a confession where he clarifies that Rosa Blanco was unjustly condemned. Fausto manipulates saying that Ezequiel also confesses that he killed his brother Augusto, Camila's father. She arrives in time to stop Ezequiel from shooting Fausto.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: After discovering Nicolás kissing Florencia, Victoria reproaches her beloved for allowing himself to be manipulated by his wife, who hides behind her father's memory to show pity. Although Nicolás refuses to believe that Victoria is capable of murdering a horse, Florencia convinces him that his beloved Guanipa is capable of anything to regain his love; at that moment, two farmhands inform the couple that the house of the deceased Rosendo Zapata is on fire. An enraged Nicolás arrives at Cantarrana in search of an explanation for what happened, to which Victoria -without letting him speak- assures him that she was to blame. At nightfall, Victoria claims to her father to have murdered General and to have marked him with her iron to be blamed, but Hilario assures her that he is not guilty of that death; Victoria is willing to clear up the matter. On a new day, Florencia meets Moncho in a remote part of the hacienda to give him a certain amount of money for having helped her kill her father's horse; Moncho is convinced that someone else is behind the idea of killing the animal.

programme.title: La Trepadora
programme.desc: Convinced that Fernanda is behind the death of the late Rosendo's horse, Hilario warns Florencia that her half-sister plans to involve her in her traps; Hilario is sure that someone else is receiving money from Fernanda to frame Victoria in General's death. Federico tries to impose himself in Los Samanes and go over Nicolás' orders, he makes it clear to him that he is just another pawn within the hacienda. Florencia unburdens herself with Fernanda, because she knows that Nicolás would not leave her for Victoria but because he does not really love her; however, Nicolás contacts his aunt to let her know that he will look for Florencia. Moncho notifies Hilario of his resignation as foreman of Cantarrana. Sergio receives a visit from Victoria, who has changed her mind, because although she does not want to hurt Sergio, she is determined to forget Nicolás del Casal for good.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Lorena and Guillermo argue in what seems to be their daily routine. In the back room of an antique shop, Claudio Corona hires a Mafioso to kill his brother Marco Aurelio so he can take possession of his goods. Lorena learns that her husband is a hitman. To recover her kidnapped son, Lorena must commit a crime.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Guillermo tells Lorena that if she does not kill Marco Aurelio Corona, she will never see her son again. Lorena returns to Lucas and informs him that she was unable to kill him. As fate would have it, Lorena and Alberto meet again. Alberto is shocked to recognize Lorena and wonders how she ended up being his father's personal nurse.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: In the presence of Pastora, Raúl, Octavia, Pereto, Manuel Jesús, Baudillo, Edilio and Cepeda, Israel and Misael raise their weapons.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Patricia y María Amelia habían denunciado el crimen de la muerte de Leoncio. Torrealba las enfrenta pues quiere saber cómo fue que Rosa mató a Leoncio. Patricia, desesperada, bebe sin freno. Ante su descontrol, el detective, capcioso, duda de ella.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ante las intenciones de Ezequiel, Octavia y Marcelina agreden verbalmente a Camila. Max le propone y Camila duda pero accede a casarse con él. En una cena, Ezequiel reúne a sus hijos y Camila será la homenajeada especial.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: En la cena, el tema principal será Rosa Blanco. Ezequiel dice que esa mujer fue una oportunista que enamoró y se aprovechó de su hermano menor, Leoncio. Astrid ofende agregando que fue una prostituta, culpable de la guerra entre las dos familias por su relación con Augusto Aragón y también con Leoncio López.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en saber sobre su relación familiar, piensa que pueda ser prima de Max. Ezequiel quiere despejar la duda de que podría ser su sobrina, interroga a la Madre Isabel que niega saberlo y también recurre a Marcelina que se lo confirma. Camila, protege a Chantal, una niña que vende flores.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Camila en idílicos momentos sin importar ní el resultado del A.D.N. Continúan en la búsqueda de Rosa Blanco. Dos encomiendas entregadas por un mensajero, una para los López Méndez y otra para los Aragón, confirman la reaparición de El Doliente.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Al llegar a la casa de El Jagüey, Madre Isabel no los deja entrar, conocen a Henry y presumen que también pueda ser hijo de Rosa Blanco. Max piensa que algo grave

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: La Madre Isabel, insiste en que Rosa Blanco causará mucho daño a Camila. Poco lo que se sabe, sólo que por una llamada asegura que regresará para vengarse.

programme.title: Buenas Noches, Dijo La Señorita Pájaro
programme.desc: Un adulterio, un secreto familiar, un asesino en serie. Una historia fabricada con estructura de muñecas rusas y con ritmo de montañas rusas.

programme.title: El Director (Las Siete Madres de Edipo)
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estudiantes de actuación siguiendo sus sueños se embarcan en un proyecto para filmar una película de terror que no resulta ser lo que esperaban.

programme.title: Los Siete Sellos de la Santa Muerte 2
programme.desc: Después de desmantelar a una poderosa secta los misteriosos crímenes continúan y la policía se dedica a investigar quien es el nuevo líder de la organización para atraparlo y acabar con la violencia.

programme.title: La Mujer que Hablaba con Los Muertos
programme.desc: Es un film de Terror. Cuando Elena Castaño era una niña, tenía un don: era capaz de comunicarse con los espíritus de los muertos. pero esa capacidad desapareció al crecer.

programme.title: El Mariachi Gringo
programme.desc: Comedia romántica sobre un joven de la América profunda que -tras tener como improvisado maestro de guitarra a un emigrante- viaja a México huyendo de su vida tediosa y de su familia, para ejercitarse como mariachi.

programme.title: Canon: Fidelidad al Límite
programme.desc: Mariana de 35 años, es una arquitecta que trabaja y es socia de un importante despacho de arquitectos, está casada con Julián de 40 años, quien es corresponsal de guerra. Está enamorados, felices, con relación sexual cotidiana. Son padre de dos hijos de 14 y 17 año. En el juego sexual, Julián menciona que no le importaría la infidelidad a condición de estar enterado del hecho con detalles.

programme.title: Bendita Calamidad
programme.desc: Los hermanos Fayos, Anselmo y Ricardo, están con el agua al cuello. Su bar no funciona, el Ayuntamiento lo clausura y se ha agotado el dinero que, para ir tirando, solicitaron a unos prestamistas que no se andan con contemplaciones a la hora de cobrar. Piden consejo a un abogado poco amigo de la ley, Antonio Orestes, que les sugiere una vía rápida para acabar con sus problemas: El secuestro exprés de un constructor de Tarazona.

programme.title: El Mariachi Gringo

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.
